description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from catwalk makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.Heel: 2.5"UpperSynthetic leather straps in thong style with a suede inner along the midfoot and has a toe separator Padded synthetic leather footbed OutsoleDurable PU outsole with herringbone grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleSandal careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
